div.p: Logic Flow: Fully-Associative Search: O(capacity) Linear Scan
Bit 0: Valid Entry must be warm and mapped to valid memory.
The Tag Virtual Page Number is the primary search key.
Isolation ASID match avoids TLB flushes on context switch.

ul.li: Note: Real CPUs use CAM (Content Addressable Memory) to perform these checks in parallel (O(1)).
vpn_t vpn : Target Virtual Page Number
On HIT: Extract PFN from entry
On MISS: Initiate Hardware Page Table Walk
